violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by utensils and buckets. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Eggs, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Eggs were voluntarily disposed of. Eggs 74 DF Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, potatoes was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Potatoes had only been cooked less then 2 hours prior potatoes were tempted at 68DF. Potatoes were spread onto a backing sheet one layer high and placed in refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The dishwasher in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Service Call placed during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The floor in the kitchen prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2027
The floor in the back kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026

Cooked food items was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was holding an ambient of 46 Degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Produce and non tcs food items were moved to working unit. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The cutting boards in the back are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The floor in the back kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
